memberdef.argsstring: (self, LineWithMeta first_line, LineWithMeta second_line, method get_feature, float threshold=0)
memberdef.name: __compare_lines

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: __compare_lines method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: PairedFeatureExtractor for document structure extraction pipeline

detaileddescription.para: This class is used as an auxiliary feature extractor to the main extractor. It allows to add "raw" features related to the lines importance. Based on one line property (size, indentation) it computes a raw line's depth inside the document tree.
Example: For lines line1 (size=16) line2 (size=14) line3 (size=12) line4 (size=12) line5 (size=14) line6 (size=12) We will obtain a feature vector (raw_depth_size) [0, 1, 2, 2, 1, 2]
